title: both... and... / either... or... / neither... nor...

formulas.formula: both A and B + 複數動詞
either A or B / neither A nor B + 就近一致動詞
formulas.zh: A或B其中之一/A和B都不...（動詞依靠近的主詞單複數）

explanation: either...or 和 neither...nor 都遵循「近似一致原則」，即動詞與最接近的主詞保持一致。either...or 表示兩者中選其一；neither...nor 表示兩者都否定。結構為「either/neither + A + or/nor + B」。使用時機在於表達二選一或全盤否定的情況。易混淆點是誤用主語為複數時仍用單數動詞，或忽視最近主詞原則。注意 neither...nor 後的主詞若為複數，則動詞用複數形。

examples.eng: Both studying hard and getting enough sleep are important for students.
examples.chi: 認真讀書和充足睡眠對學生都很重要。

examples.eng: Either the teacher or the students are responsible for the project's success.
examples.chi: 老師或學生其中之一要為專案成功負責。

examples.eng: Neither John nor his friends were present at the meeting yesterday.
examples.chi: 約翰和他的朋友昨天都沒出席會議。

examples.eng: Both the novel and the film have received excellent reviews from critics.
examples.chi: 這部小說和電影都獲得評論家的好評。

extension.tip: 判斷動詞單複數時，both...and 永遠用複數；either...or 和 neither...nor 則看靠近動詞的主詞。若主詞為「動名詞/不定詞+名詞」，both...and 仍用複數。常見錯誤是忽視就近一致原則，導致主動詞搭配錯誤。

examples.test: Both he and I _____ (am/are) going to the party.
Either the manager or the employees _____ (has/have) to make a decision.
examples.result: → have（employees 為複數，靠近動詞，故用複數）

examples.test: Neither the book nor the movies _____ (was/were) interesting to me.
examples.result: → were（movies 為複數，靠近動詞，故用複數）

extension.note: 「Both 加複數、Either/Neither 靠近數」——記住這個口訣，就能快速判斷動詞變化。

parts: Both the principal and the teachers
exercises.sentence: Both the principal and the teachers are satisfied with the students' performance.
exercises.translation: 校長和老師對學生的表現都很滿意。

parts: Either your sister or your brothers
exercises.sentence: Either your sister or your brothers need to help clean the house.
exercises.translation: 要不你妹妹要不你哥哥其中之一需要幫忙打掃房子。

parts: Neither the president nor his advisors
willing to compromise on this issue.
exercises.sentence: Neither the president nor his advisors are willing to compromise on this issue.
exercises.translation: 總統和他的顧問都不願意在這個議題上妥協。

parts: Both attending lectures and doing homework regularly
exercises.sentence: Both attending lectures and doing homework regularly are essential for academic success.
exercises.translation: 定期上課和做功課對學業成功都是必要的。

parts: Either the manager or the employees
exercises.sentence: Either the manager or the employees are required to attend the meeting tomorrow.
exercises.translation: 經理或員工其中一方被要求明天參加會議。

parts: Neither my friends nor my brother
what I should do about this problem.
exercises.sentence: Neither my friends nor my brother knows what I should do about this problem.
exercises.translation: 我的朋友和我的哥哥都不知道我應該如何解決這個問題。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的動詞形式使句子文法正確
mc_exercises.question_eng: Both reading books and watching movies _______ good ways to relax.
mc_exercises.explanation: both...and 連接的主詞一律採複數動詞。「both reading books and watching movies」為複數概念，故使用 are。選項 A 是單數動詞，不符合 both...and 的規則；C、D 為不適當的動詞形式。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 根據就近一致原則選擇正確的動詞形式
mc_exercises.question_eng: Either the manager or his assistants _______ going to attend the meeting tomorrow.
mc_exercises.explanation: either...or 遵循就近一致原則，動詞形式由靠近它的主詞決定。此句中 assistants（複數）緊靠動詞，故用 are。選項 A 錯誤因為 assistants 是複數；C、D 時態錯誤，句子指未來動作。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 在 neither...nor 結構中應用就近一致原則
mc_exercises.question_eng: Neither the students nor their teacher _______ aware of the rule change until yesterday.
mc_exercises.explanation: neither...nor 遵循就近一致原則。此句中 teacher（單數）緊靠動詞，故用單數過去式 was。選項 A 錯誤因為 teacher 是單數；C 時態錯誤；D 雖為複數但時態不符合過去敘述。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 在複雜句中正確應用對等連接詞組的動詞一致性
mc_exercises.question_eng: Both his leadership skills and his ability to communicate effectively _______ what make him an excellent manager, and either his colleagues or his supervisor _______ nominated him for promotion.
mc_exercises.explanation: 第一空：both...and 連接複數主詞，動詞用 are；第二空：either...or，supervisor（單數）靠近動詞，故用 has。選項 C 第二空錯誤（supervisor 單數應用 has）；A、D 第一空錯誤（both...and 須用複數動詞）。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的動詞形式，表示兩者中只有一人負責
mc_exercises.question_eng: Either you or your brother _______ responsible for cleaning the house.
mc_exercises.explanation: either...or遵循近似一致原則，動詞與最接近的主詞保持一致。此句最接近的主詞為單數your brother，故用is。A項are為複數動詞錯誤；C項am用法不符；D項be為動詞原型不適用。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷neither...nor結構中的正確動詞時態和形式
mc_exercises.question_eng: Neither the manager nor the employees _______ satisfied with the new company policy.
mc_exercises.explanation: neither...nor遵循近似一致原則，動詞應與最接近的主詞employees（複數）一致，故用are。A項is為單數形式錯誤；C、D項為過去式，但句子無時態標記應為現在式。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 瑪麗和湯姆都喜歡看電影。
translation_exercises.answer: Both Mary and Tom like watching movies.
hints: 提示1：Both...and 後面一律使用複數動詞，regardless of 主詞是否單數
提示2：常見錯誤是寫成 'Both Mary and Tom likes'，須記住 both...and = 複數

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 你可以選擇去看演唱會或參加補習班，但不能兩者都選。
translation_exercises.answer: You can choose either attending the concert or joining the cram school, but not both.
key_points: Either...or 連接兩個動名詞短語
邏輯轉折 but not both
hints: 提示1：Either...or 用於表示二選一的情況，兩個連接的成分應為平行結構（都用動名詞或都用名詞）
提示2：若要表達「不能兩者都選」，可加 'but not both' 來強調互斥性

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 小王既不喜歡數學也不喜歡物理，所以他打算改選歷史。
translation_exercises.answer: Neither math nor physics appeals to Xiaowang, so he plans to switch to history.
key_points: 就近一致：physics（單數）+ appeals（單數動詞）
hints: 提示1：Neither...nor 遵循就近一致原則，動詞形式由最靠近的主詞（physics）決定，此處為單數
提示2：常見錯誤是忽視就近一致，誤寫成 'appeal'；另外 appeal to 意為『吸引』，比 like 更正式

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 不論是老師的建議還是父母的期望，都深深影響了她對大學科系的選擇；相反地，她自己的興趣或朋友的意見都沒有產生太大的影響。
translation_exercises.answer: Both her teachers' suggestions and her parents' expectations have deeply influenced her choice of university major; conversely, neither her own interests nor her friends' opinions have had much impact.
key_points: Both...and + 複數動詞 have influenced
Neither...nor + 就近一致 have had（opinions 複數）
所有格與名詞短語的平行性
hints: 提示1：Both...and 連接複雜名詞短語時（含所有格），仍須使用複數動詞；Neither...nor 時要確認靠近動詞的主詞數量
提示2：常見錯誤是名詞短語不平行（如一個用所有格一個不用），或混淆 impact 與 influence 的搭配用法（have influence vs. have impact）

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 明天要麼下雨，要麼下雪。
translation_exercises.answer: Either rain or snow will occur tomorrow.
key_points: will occur（動詞與最接近主詞 snow 一致）
hints: 提示1：Either A or B 的動詞應與 B 保持一致，此句 B 為 snow（單數）
提示2：不能寫成『Either rain or snow will occurs』，snow 是單數

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 要不是你媽媽，要不就是你爸爸會來參加學校運動會。
translation_exercises.answer: Either your mother or your father will attend the school sports day.
key_points: will attend（動詞與 father 一致）
hints: 提示1：Either A or B，動詞應與最接近的主詞 B（your father）保持一致
提示2：注意 father 是單數，所以用 will attend，不能用 will attends
